text: States Sue to Block Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger, Defying DOJ - Variety
fullText: A coalition of states has sued to block the merger of Paramount and Warner Bros., though the Department of Justice approved the deal last month.

text: Oil prices rise following the latest fighting in the Middle East, as AI stocks sink - AP News

text: UK counter-terror police lead investigation into suspected murder of former lawmaker Ann Widdecombe - CNN
